summary: NFC-e (Nota Fiscal de Consumidor Eletrônica) testing completed. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend NFC-e emission flow tested and fixed - vendasAPI.atualizar call was removed as backend already handles the update.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - vendasAPI.atualizar was being called but method didn't exist. Removed unnecessary call since backend already updates venda in /api/nfce/emitir endpoint.

critical_code_review_comments: NFC-e emission is in HOMOLOGAÇÃO mode (SEFAZ test environment) - not production. This is expected for testing.
Certificate password in .env has semicolon which may cause issues in some environments
nfce_service.py uses a global counter for NFC-e numbers - in production should use database sequence
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing vendas in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: NFC-e APIs are working in HOMOLOGAÇÃO mode. All 4 endpoints tested: /api/nfce/configuracao, /api/nfce/status-sefaz, /api/nfce/emitir, /api/nfce/historico. Frontend VendasPage Emitir NFC-e button works correctly. Fixed issue where vendasAPI.atualizar was being called unnecessarily.

api_nfce_status_sefaz.details: Returns online status and codigo from SEFAZ

api_nfce_emitir.details: Emits NFC-e with chave_acesso and numero_nfce

api_nfce_historico.details: Returns list of emitted NFC-e with pagination

frontend_vendas_emitir_nfce.details: Button clicks, emits NFC-e, shows success toast, updates status to Emitida
